The five kinds of houses of a commander-in-chief are in order
64, 58, 52, 46 and 40 cubits in width, and their length exceeds the
width by a sixth.
The length of the varieties would be in order 74^, 67I-, 60|.,
53|- and 46-3- cubits. The third quarter of the verse, as it is, is faulty
being deficient in one Matra. It can be rectified by adding 5 at the
end : qq ij^ifor 5 ]

The houses of ministers are 60, 56, 52, 48 and 44 cubits in
width and their length exceeds their breadth by an eighth. The
houses of queens have half the dimensions of the above ones.
[The length of the five kinds would be in order 67^, 63, 58^,
54 and 49^ cubits. The breadth and length of the queens' houses
would be : 30 and 33.75 cubits ; 28 and 314 ; 26 and 29^ ; 24 and
27 ; and lastl/22 and 24.75 cubits.]
